name: Rule Induction
description: Infer a hidden word-to-number rule from labeled examples and apply it to a new word.

binding_vow.description: The agent is shown several word->number examples generated by a single hidden rule (for example: number of letters, number of vowels, or the alphabet position of the first letter). It must induce the rule and predict the number for one new query word. Examples are guaranteed to uniquely determine the rule within the active difficulty tier and to show varying outputs, so the answer is always determinable. A strong agent forms and tests hypotheses against every example rather than latching onto the first pattern that fits one case.

action_space.description: A single non-negative integer (just the number). The first integer in the response is used.

reward.description: 1.0 if the predicted number equals the hidden rule applied to the query word, 0.0 otherwise.
